title: Counties of Ireland
about: County boundaries for the Republic of Ireland come from GADM level-1 data. The six counties of Northern Ireland were reconstructed by dissolving Natural Earth 1:10m district boundaries into the historic counties (Antrim, Armagh, Down, Fermanagh, Londonderry, Tyrone).

A pristine historic-county dataset wasn't available, so a few internal boundaries near Belfast are approximate; the county set, outlines and overall shapes are correct and quiz-accurate. Outlines are simplified for display.
